sections.paragraph:
adv. (from יֹום and the adverbial termination ־ָם)-

(1) by day. יֹומָם וָלַיְלָה by day and by night, i.e. continually, Lev 8:35 Num 9:21. Like substantives-(a) it receives prepositions. בְּיֹומָם Neh 9:19, and-(b) it is put in the genit. צָרֵי יֹומָם daily enemies, Eze 30:16.

(2) daily, see Ezek. l.c. (Syr. ܝܺܡܳܡܳܐ a day, ܒܺܝܡܳܡܳܐ daily.)
